## Release — Blackhole v0.7.0

### ✨ What's new in v0.7.0

Minor release: merge-gate orchestration, recovery drift healing, Cursor resume automation, and cost-optimized worker model routing — all landed since v0.6.1.

#### Merge gate & dependency ordering (ADR-005)

- **PR merge-gate** — orchestrator enforces dependency-ordered merges and LGTM review before closing issues; documented in `merge-gate.md` and accepted ADR-005.
- **Coordinator/orchestrator playbook updates** — forge sync, queue DAG, and phase-loop references aligned with merge-gate obligations (`V-GIT-01` linkage, blocked merges when upstream PRs are open).

#### Recovery & drift healing

- **`recovery-drift.ts`** — detects artifact-vs-queue drift (plan exists, PR open, in-flight stuck) and proposes heal actions per `recovery-protocol.md`.
- **`plannerReady` gate (§9.3)** — planner heal now requires both plan artifact presence and `plannerReady: true` in `DriftContext`, closing false-positive heal paths.
- **Test coverage** — `plan-stub.md` fixture asserted via `fs.existsSync`; recovery and resume-signal negative paths expanded.

#### Cursor Multitask & resume automation

- **In-turn worker barrier** — orchestrator must barrier-wait background workers before ending a turn; fixes Pattern B stalls where workers completed but queue never triaged (#151).
- **Hybrid resume hook** — `campaign-resume-signal.ts` + `resume-request.json` SSOT; SubagentStop hook template for auto-resuming orchestrator without user chat (#154).
- **Fail-open CLI paths** — malformed stdin, empty stdin, and top-level catch paths tested; orchestrator stop with empty queue produces no resume signal.

#### Worker model routing

- **`worker_model_policy: cost-optimized`** (default) — orchestrator resolves per-spawn model tier from role, track, and `route{}` signals (`economy` / `standard` / `premium`) instead of pinning agents to a single model.
- **Config + docs** — `model-routing.md`, `config-template.md`, and orchestrator spawn checklist updated; `inherit` policy preserves v0.6.1 session-inheritance behavior.

### Verification

`bun test`: 256/256 pass. `bun run verify`: all checks pass.

---
